mapper.sql: select id, program_id, year, score_line, single_math, single_english, single_politics, single_professional, verify_status, source_id, created_at from admission_score
mapper.insert: insert into admission_score (program_id, year, score_line, single_math, single_english, single_politics, single_professional, verify_status, source_id) values (#{programId}, #{year}, #{scoreLine}, #{singleMath}, #{singleEnglish}, #{singlePolitics}, #{singleProfessional}, #{verifyStatus}, #{sourceId})
mapper.delete:
delete from admission_score where id in
#{id}
